transcript.text:
Should get 1 of everything
10 Toro Sushi,
10 Otoro Sushi,
[Hold up...]
[Continues ordering]
[Still going]
[Storage almost full]
Oh and a bowl of udon, please
[The owner's lucky day]
[Something seems different about this place...]
[It looks scrumptious]
I've never seen anyone eat this much alone
Hello everyone
I'm here at Mapo-gu, Seongsan-dong to eat some sushi
People say this is their "life sushi"
They're known for their sushi that melts right away

One of the best tuna sushi I'll give it a try
It's sushi! It's been a while
Over here
[Naranga] [Seoul, Mapo-gu]
Hello
-Are you Tzuyang? -Yes I am
-Sorry that I couldn't recognize you right away -No no no
Sushi is going to be great
These are the kinds
Not too many on the menu
I should get 1 of everything
10 Toro Sushi, 10 Otoro Sushi,
5 pieces of Blue Fin Tuna, 10 Sashimi,
10 halibut fins,
5 Salmon Belly,
10 pieces of raw shrimp,

10 freshwater eels,
Tako wasabi, steamed prawn, octopus, eggs All 5 each (Grand total of 90 pieces)
I got lost in the middle
[Is this right...?]
I've never had an order this big before
1 bowl of udon as well, please
(cough) I got you
You're eating all of this...?
Yes, I plan to
Wait just a sec and I will bring you the food
[90 pieces of sushi coming right up!]
Thank you
Looks great
Bluefin, salmon belly,
Halibut,
Halibut fins,

Shrimp, octopus,
[Is that everything?]
[Nope]
Tako wasabi
That's it, right?
And your dessert
Thank you
I've never seen anyone eat this much alone
I was planning on ordering 100 pieces, but I'm at 90
I will need to eat 10 more later
Otoro
This is the Toro
What should I start with?
Signature first
Toro first
Bon appetit

Dip it
The rice is so soft It melted
Is there a special sauce? It's delicious
The rice is seasoned so well
Rice is everything when it comes to sushi
It's put together really well
but it scatters away
The seasoning is tasty
Otoro
[With wasabi]
This is the tuna's inner meat
It's red
It melts in my mouth
[Lost chopsticks]
I'll try everything 1 by 1
Octopus This looks good too

The octopus is seasoned well and it's chewy
Steamed shrimp
I don't usually eat this type of sushi
The rice is so good that everything tastes good with it
Salmon belly is the best
It's sweet and savory
Egg sushi
Restaurants with good egg sushi are the real ones
It's got that flavoring scent And melts away
I feel like this mukbang will be done quickly
[Wasabi attack]
Sashimi sushi
This is the halibut fin
Same halibut, but this one is very soft
while this is crunchy and has a great texture
Raw soy sauce shrimp

This looks good too
[Freshwater eel sushi]
This is real So good
Everything here melts right away
This is the best
I tried everything and they were all good
This is really a "life sushi" place
Check this shrimp out
Delicious
The marbling on this goes crazy
This place is amazing
I've been to a lot of sushi places
Wow, it's delicious
Most sushi restaurants are very similar
but this store's rice is different
And everything is so fresh

But rice is everything...
I don't want it to go away
It just melts away
There's this smell on eels sometimes which I really don't like
Like the herbal smell I don't like those
But this isn't like that
Next next... Belly!
They need to be left evenly I have to balance it out
5,
Wait, I had one of that already Why is it still 5?
[Just right now...]
Is this magic?
PD: He gave you 1 more since you eat a lot
So I had 91 pieces here?
Very nice
This is completely red

This is the softest
Not oily and it melts right away
Toro
Octopus
This is good too
It's top tier
Eel!
1 tako wasabi
Balance
The eel is the best
Now it's 6 of everything
Is this aged? It's so soft
It's good without soy sauce
-Here's the udon -Thank you
Shrimps are on the house
Aren't you eating too much?

I'm not even halfway there
Our rice cooker makes 10 servings total
And I used 3 of those
Really?
[You're scaring me...]
I'm not even close to finishing
I hope that the food suits your taste
It's so good Really
-Take your time -Okay, thank you
Udon
That's good!
This is like something I had as a kid
Next, Eel
I feel like I can eat 100 of these eel sushis
I think I say this all the time: "I wish they had 1 near my house"
A lot of people dip the ginger inside the soy sauce

But I don't eat ginger
Should I try it with Rakkyo? Will it work?
It works
With some soy sauce
I brought the Sikhye (rice punch) for you
Really? Thank you!
It's homemade
Did you really?
That's delicious
Udon tastes good too
These sushi melt in my mouth
This is good too
The most I've eaten was 240 pieces
I can definitely do 240 from here
[What did you say...?!]
240?!

Almost 3 times of that
That's incredible
I've been watching this thing
It's dessert I'll try 1
The scent... This is like a flower
It's good
I like the scent
Are you eating that right now?
Yes, it looked good
Can I have a little more?
[Of course~] Thank you
[Now she continues to eat without saying anything]
It'll be good to dine-in than to get it to-go
because the rice was really delicious when it was warm and fresh
[More dessert] Thank you
He gave me a lot

What is this? It's so refreshing
Strangely, I always crave fruits after eating sushi
Excuse me,
Can I order more eel sushi?
[How many? 2? 3?]
I will need to make it 100, so 9 more
That was fast
Thank you
The tuna sushi is melted, but it's still good
Let's eat the freshly made eel sushi
This is insane
It's so good when it's fresh
I've been starting to get used to eating good food lately
So each bite never really hit the spot like this
A bite of this really does it for me
Come here, dessert

[100 pieces of sushi+1 bowl of udon cleared]
Dessert over here is perfect too
This is so good
My aunt makes them herself
It's supposed to be 1 per person for dessert
So that should be right for you
[1 for 10 pieces of sushi, so I guess]
What do you use to make it this refreshing?
It's a secret
I can't give you the recipe, but I can give you some for you to take home
Wow, really?
Yes, thank you
So that you can enjoy it at home
Thank you so much This tastes so good
I'm going to eat them little by little
Thanks everyone~

She ate 100 pieces
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
